title: himantoglossum caprinum subsp. jankae
intro: Himantoglossum caprinum subsp. jankae, also known as Jankae's orchid or Balkan himantoglossum, is a rare subspecies of the Himantoglossum caprinum orchid native to the Balkan Peninsula. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various ailments. It is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits, including reducing stress and improving respiratory function. Himantoglossum caprinum subsp. jankae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, although its use requires caution and should be consulted with a healthcare professional due to the lack of scientific research on its efficacy and potential side effects.
